title: Session-Orchestrator Ecosystem Health Policy
description: Ecosystem health configuration: service endpoints, CI pipelines, and critical issue labels. Consumed by the ecosystem-health skill during session-start. Generated by /bootstrap --ecosystem-health. See issue #188.

endpoints.description: Service health endpoints to probe during ecosystem-health checks.

pipelines.description: CI pipeline identifiers to query for status.

criticalIssueLabels.description: Issue labels that classify an issue as critical across cross-repos.

name.description: Human-readable display name for the service.

url.description: URL to probe (curl -sf). Should return HTTP 2xx when healthy.

id.description: CI pipeline identifier. For GitLab: branch name or pipeline ID. For GitHub: workflow file name.

label.description: Optional display label shown in the health dashboard.
